# ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.explicit

**Case**

The media item lyrics contain explicit language.

## Declaration

```swift
case explicit
```

## Media Item Lyric Content Ratings

- **ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.none**: There is no rating information for the media item lyrics.
- **ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.clean**: The media item lyrics don’t contain explicit language.
